name: spark-commit
description: AI-powered git commit message generator. Currently supports Claude CLI.

sparkCommit.cliPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the Claude CLI binary. Leave empty to use `claude` from PATH. Useful when VS Code doesn't inherit PATH from your shell.

sparkCommit.prompt.default:
Generate a concise git commit message for the following staged diff.
Use imperative mood. First line max 72 characters. No markdown, no backticks.
If the change is complex, add a blank line and a short body.

{diff}
sparkCommit.prompt.markdownDescription: Prompt template passed to Claude. Use `{diff}` as a placeholder for the staged diff. If `{diff}` is missing, the diff is appended at the end.
